name: Versionable
description: Versioning profile enabling tracking of version chains, release sequences, and relationships between iterations of evolving resources.
ExpectedUse: Version management for software releases, dataset updates, iterative publications, and any digital objects undergoing sequential development with explicit version relationships.

Properties.Name: version
Properties.Title: Version
Properties.Description: Semantic version identifier for this release

Properties.Name: nextVersion
Properties.Title: Next Version
Properties.Description: Handle pointing to a subsequent version

Properties.Name: previousVersion
Properties.Title: Previous Version
Properties.Description: Handle pointing to a prior version

Properties.Name: latestVersion
Properties.Title: Latest Version
Properties.Description: Handle pointing to the most current version
